message:
chore: update 7 TUI snapshots for dynamic triage version string

Snapshots now show the actual package version from CARGO_PKG_VERSION
instead of the previously hard-coded "1.0.0".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
